reviews.review_msg: As a 1st year, my essay grades were C-/B- range, but with Free Writes it boosted my final grade to a B. He does not round grades but we get the highest possible % value. His course was difficult and the TA can grade harshly. Sometimes he would be nice and extend deadlines for our essays. Our final was to hand-write 3 short essays in 3 hours.
He actually made poetry interesting
Best prof I've ever had.

Dr. Coley's lectures are very enjoyable but the material is very confusing as well as the assignments. He just asks you to write essays but doesn't really teach you how to write an essay or what he is looking for.

I took Coley's 433W Fall 2024 - it was incredible! So much reading, but it is always clear Coley is 100% dedicated to helping students reach success. Very clear feedback on essays, strives to encourage and elaborate student ideas, gives resources for papers when asked. He's incredible, take a class with him if you can! You won't regret it. 10/10
Professor Coley was great! His lectures were enjoyable. You will be good as long as you do your readings, as it will be easier to understand the course material and help writing essays!

His lectures are INTERESTING for a 9:30am class. He is funny and always there to help you after class. You can see he loves what he teaches. He's the best prof I had till date! Would definitely take any course he teaches if it's in my requirement.
Very good prof, lectures usually capture the main idea from what you missed, if you miss any readings. Didn't like poetry, and still don't but Coley made it tolerable.

First time with him and it was a really good experience.There may be some books you need to buy for the class, but some are found online. He's really easy to talk to and obviously cares about his students.
amazing, icon, so approachable and nice and very articulate and knowledgeable. lectures are so engaging and he speaks with clarity and he's so funny would take this class again.

I loved Coley! I only took this class as it was one of the only ones left since I registered late, but I don't regret it at all! Coley made me take interest in poetry as his lectures are very entertaining and easy to follow along. As someone who hates writing/English classes he made it fun and worthwhile. Would totally recommend!!!

David Coley made lectures very engaging and enjoyable along with providing helpful resources for the readings (make sure you keep up with them). Overall a very enjoyable experience as a 1st year student.

Incredible lecturer and seems to really care about the subject matter and the students. We went through a lot of material in a short amount of time and the lectures didn't always stretch to cover all of it, but otherwise the course was well-designed. You will not pass if you can't think critically about a text!!!

as a science student, the class was pretty tough, but SO interesting and thought provoking. David is super funny and a really nice and passionate prof, and his lectures were awesome. the course has pretty intense subject matter but he took a really respectful approach while still allowing room for discussion. get physical copies of all the books

Professor Coley was great! He made the lectures engaging and enjoyable (especially if you've done the readings) and really guides you in understanding the material. The assignments are fairly straightforward and talking to him (and your TA) outside of lecture will really guarantee your success. Overall great dude and has the cutest dog everrr!

Professor Coley is entertaining and has good lectures. He relies strongly on books to help you understand and as long as you keep up with the readings you'll be able to enjoy/be present during lecture. I encourage going to his office hours and establishing a relationship with your TA as well for highest success.

Your grades (participation, assignment, final) are all marked by your same TA (get a guy) The topics for essays/finals were ok as long as you have good arguments and make good notes/read books. Lectures r important for final topics. It is unfair that one person makes decisions for how well we argue in our essays. We should be able to dispute marks.

He is legitimately my favourite professor, and it was the only class I looked forward to. The lectures were amazing and he knew exactly what he was talking about - I just wished his lectures were longer, so he did not have to rush through them. There is lots of reading (five poetry books), but it was not too bad. Just a great prof.

One of the best professors ever! Hes funny and enthusiastic about what he teaches, which is contagious. You do need to read for class, but he goes through the material in class. Attending the tutorials is mandatory. The lectures were always fun to go to, and he made it engaging.
Really great lecturer and makes even the most boring book seem interesting. Encourages participation and discussion and has a great sense of humour!

Best English prof! Passionate about what he does and makes every lecture engaging. Accessible and supportive, and really helps improve students' writing skills. Would recommend courses with him; it doesn't matter what it is, you'll be engaged and learn a lot. Good attitude and easy to talk to, David is by far one of the best profs of any department

Coley is a great prof. You can tell that he is passionate about the material he teaches, and that really comes off during his lectures. He makes reading medieval texts fun and interesting, and his laid back vibe makes him very easy to approach. Highly recommend
AMAZING! David is by far the best prof in the English department. Take a class with him, it doesn't really matter which one, just take one.

David is a super engaging prof. He is very inspirational/dedicated to what he does. Very helpful outside class aswell. HOWEVER, I dont know why he has such a low rating for easiness, he is an extremely hard marker with super hard essay topics. I worked harder for a B in his class then any other class (3.7 GPA). Has a vision you must see to do well

Dr. Coley is alright. Don't think he deserves the insanely high reviews that he has up here. I feel like you have to stick directly to what he wants, as he does not allow a lot of wiggle room for creative thinkers, or those who wish to push their essays further.

Hands down the best professor I've had at SFU! He really cares about the subject and his students. Class discussion is encouraged, so come prepared and expect a fun and engaging lecture. He's readily available for help, is a fair marker, and keeps the material interesting. Plus, he's hilarious. Overall, an A+ professor. :)

Hands down the best professor I've had at SFU! Really cares about the subject and his students, lectures are never boring. Class discussions are generally expected so do your reading and you'll have no problem. He's very helpful and accessible in office hours. Plus, he's hilarious. A+ professor. :)

David is an incredible prof! We had five books to read in one term - by no means an easy task - and two papers to write. I'll admit that the readings were much harder than I'd expected for a first-year class, but despite that, and the fact that I had a night class, David was engaging and kept us all awake. He's a tough marker but you learn so much!

One of the best profs I have ever had at SFU! Very engaging, encouraging, and he is always there for you! He is not an easy marker, but he is very fair. I learned so much from this course, and would take english with him again :)

Wonderful, wonderful prof with a great lecture style. He will whip your writing into shape (that's why he will 'make you work for it') and genuinely cares about your grade and your academic experience. Sarcastic quips are incredibly appreciated in his class (within reason)-- seriously! Take this man's class! You will NOT regret it.
very nice professor

David is a wonderful professor! He makes complex Chaucer readings interesting and fun - he is absolutely hilarious! David cares so much about his students and is always willing to help. Make sure you do your readings though - otherwise you will be lost. The class goes by so fast b/c everyone is so engaged. One of my favourite classes at SFU so far!

David Coley is a FANTASTIC prof! Very spontaneous, engaging, and thorough in his lecture styles. Though he only gave my class one hour sessions, at often times, students complained that they wanted to stick around for another hour. 10/10 would attend another class by this guy. wonderful prof!

David is AMAZING! He's very passionate about what he is teaching, although he tends to get a bit behind on readings (He has A LOT to say). Never a dull moment, I highly recommend this prof. Also, he is hilarious so the class is usually roaring with laughter.

Incredible professor who actually cares about whether or not his students understand what he is trying to teach them. Goes out of his way to meet with students and answer questions. One tip: DO the readings. He will expect you to come to class with something to say about what you've read. So, just make it easy for yourself and be prepared.

Coley is such an amazing prof. He makes medieval lit come to life and has an incredible way of making a 2 hour lecture feel like 30mins. His class is always interesting and invigorating. He's a very fair marker and really cares for his students and their work. Take a course with him. You won't regret it.
Three words: BEST PROF EVER. Go take a class with him stat.
very interesting prof. highly recommend attending class. marking scheme for assignments and exams are hard!

He is clearly passionate about what he teaches. His marking is very fair, and he is extremely helpful and is actually very willing to help. Readings were interesting, as were his lectures. Fantastic Prof.

He is one of my favourite profs. Exteremely engaging and often hilarious style of lecturing. Interesting selection of books. When it comes to marking, they can mark pretty harshly. Definitely not a GPA booster!

Not surprised to see this prof rated so well. He was among the best profs I've had in English or any other course. Exteremely engaging and often hilarious style of lecturing. Only problem I had with the class is I found it was marked somewhat hard.. but that's more of a reflection of my TA than anything, I think.

Coley is by far the best prof I've ever had at SFU. He's a fair marker, hilarious, and engaging. He's always willing to help his students; he really challenges you to think critically and to read the texts with a deeper analysis. I'm really going to miss this class, and I highly recommend taking a course with him.
Coley gives exciting and intriguing lectures. Really has a passion for what he does and makes witty jokes. Highly recommend you take a course with him!
Amazing prof, great lecturer, funny and engaging. One of the best profs I've had at SFU.

Best prof @ SFU imo. Incredibly knowledgeable. Very passionate, enthusiastic about the subject. He's witty, cheerful, very helpful, flexible and understanding. We covered the Pearl Manuscript poems, each was really interesting especially since the prof encourages a very in depth anaylsis of them. Participation is a must. Hard marker but he's fair.
Great prof, great class!

Easily the best prof I have had at SFU. He is engaging and actually makes you want to attend lectures... which is not an easy thing to do for a 100 level English course. He gets you thinking and easily gets his point across in every lecture. Take his class if you get the chance!

Not only does he look like the dad from Calvin and Hobbes come to life, but he's so passionate and enthusiastic that you can't help but want to come to class. Easy marker, really helpful, cracks witty comments... what more could you want from an English prof?  You go, Glen Coco.

Taking 201 with Coley made me want to study medieval literature way more, and I am definitely taking classes with him again.  Easy marker, no essay on the exam, really interesting lecturer, awesome tutorial structure, and impecable attitude towards students. Really, I can't recommend him more! Take a class with him if you ever have the opportunity!

David is one of the best professors I have ever had the pleasure of being taught by. His lectures are engaging, and he is incredibly knowledgable about medieval lit. Beyond that he is very helpful and truly wants his students to succeed, and if you show initiative and a willingness to learn it will definitely pay off for you.
Fantastic prof! Extremely helpful and available for his students. He cares so much for the texts and his students. My favourite professor so far. he really grabs your attention and keeps you engaged!

David Coley is an unbelievably amazing professor. The class was interesting and engaging, and assignments allow for critical thinking instead of just regurgitation of the material. He's available and cares about helping his students. I have never been so sad to leave a class behind. Highly, highly recommended - you won't regret it.

I highly recommend taking an English course with David Coley.  He is intelligent, entertaining, thoughtful, helpful and everything else a student could hope for in a professor.  I'm really going to miss this class.

Take his class. You'll be glad you did, and you'll learn a lot. Only twice have I ever had a class at the end of which all the students clap for the prof: both of those classes were taught by David Coley. He's a legend.

What professor doesn't make you write an essay on a final exam!?!?!? You guessed right! David the hero! HE wakes you up, let me say that again, HE wakes you up at a 9:30am lecture. Learned lots in this class! Though the course was pretty religion heavy, but David made it all bearable :D Go on SIS and take an ENGL course that says David Coley! NOW:D

Makes archaic dry material comes to life. Always attentive, cares for students. Listens and responds to comments, not just make-work. Requires that you care in return. Maybe too much seminar, not enough lecture. Pushes discussion a bit far at times. Still, personnable and in control (shows careful prep, mindful of time constraints). Recommended!

i can't imagine having a better English prof. He is so animated and funny.There was not one lecture were I was bored. His assignments are fair and so is the amount of reading you have to do. Take his class... best prof ever.
Awesome professor. You can tell that he really loves what he does.
Can't say enough good about him. He radiates with the joy he experiences working with Medieval literature. I rarely have instructors as hands-on and involved with his students too. Amazing prof.
A very interesting prof!
Quite possibly the coolest English prof. Animated, passionate, and funny. If Coley is teaching, I definitely recommend taking that course.
very helpful and extremely funny :) take his class if you can!

Wow, the best prof ever. Marks you based on your ideas, not for grammar, punctuation, or things like that. HIGHLY recommend because he's so funny :) If you're looking for a do-able English class, must have David Coley as a prof!

Ok, he's great looking compared to other eng profs. Quite passionate and hilarious in the lecture and good at making the readings lots of fun! He makes me looking forward to the lecture every week! LOOOOOOOOOOOOOOVE HIM!!!

Best English prof ever, I went into this class just trying to get my an English credit and came out wanting to take medieval lit with him just because he is so hilarious and such a passionate prof. Made me really start to enjoy English.
I may only take English classes taught by David Coley.

Coley is the best, probably the most passionate and approachable profs I've ever had. Hilarious and intelligent, he really knows what he's talking about and presents things in a way that keeps everyone's interest. He's truly invested in his teaching and makes lectures a pleasure to attend.

Sexy, smart, and incredibly passionate, David Coley is pretty much the father I wished I'd always had. What do I plan on doing this Olympic Break? Sitting in my room playing my guitar and singing sweet serenades about my hero, David Coley. If I were to die and be reincarnated into anything I wanted, it would be David Coley's pet fish.
Awesome guy, passionate prof.  Very interesting lectures had no interest in M.Lit before taking his class.  Very approachable and helpful with assignments.  Cares about his students and it shows.
David is a great prof. This is my 2nd course with him. I took 201 with him before and I actually enjoy Medieval lit b/c of him. He's very passionate about what he teaches and very helpful.

A dry subject turned into an incredibly interesing one. I dont want to say an "easy" marker, but he values a good idea over structural faults. His passion makes the subject very very interesting. If you can, definently take a class with him.

I was stuck taking a Mideval literature class, and was looking forward to a term of dread. Coley was so fantastic, I went on to take 404W Chaucer with him. He is dynamic, passionate, and loves close textual readings. If you follow his lectures (again, dynamic and interesting!) you're well on your way to writingGood papers.HeValues ideasOverGrammer.
